rationale: Educ. Code §21.0454 governs risk factors for educator preparation programs. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: The board shall propose rules necessary to develop a set of risk factors to use in assessing the overall risk level of each educator preparation program.
_note: No overlap between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this educator preparation program risk-assessment statute.
